diagrams.title: Bootstrap Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step sequence from power-on to OS loading
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how computer starts up and OS takes control

diagrams.title: Dual-Mode Operation Architecture
diagrams.description: Illustrates the separation between user mode and kernel mode
diagrams.purpose: Understanding protection mechanisms and privilege levels

diagrams.title: Interrupt Handling Mechanism
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of interrupt processing from occurrence to resolution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS responds to asynchronous events

diagrams.title: System Call Interface
diagrams.description: Depicts how applications interact with OS kernel through system calls
elements: System Services: Process, File, Memory, Device
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the communication path between user programs and OS
